raw_consumer_statement:
My credit card was charged on XX/XX/2023, for {$870.00} in a home depot store. 
The card was in my possession at that time, and I was not at that store. Citi claims that since the card was used by chip, I am responsible for payment. I checked on public records, and saw that in year 2023, credit card chips can be counterfeit, so I should not be responsible for this unauthorized charge. 
Citi as well gave me the sales receipt with a unknown signature that's not from me, or anyone I know with items I never purchased.
